name: Multi-Phase Envelope Animations & Ambient Audio Triggers

proposal.problem: The current recipient view mounts the card directly without premium folds, seal cracking, or ambient soundscapes.
proposal.solution: Construct an animatable envelope container, implement procedural audio synthesis on load gestures, and mount interactive speaker toggle controls.

filesToCreate.purpose: Handles 3D fold, crack seal, and letter slide-out animations.
Web Audio synthesis/playback controller for click cues and ambient chords.
Floating wave button to toggle mute state.

filesToModify.change: Nest recipient stage inside the EnvelopeWrapper.
Add 3D keyframe properties for folding animations.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Utilize perspective-1200px keyframe classes in pure CSS.
architecturalDecisions.why: Avoids rendering libraries while ensuring smooth 60fps GPU execution.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Initialize Web Audio API upon clicking the wax seal.
architecturalDecisions.why: Bypasses browser autoplay blocks while keeping actions intuitive.

architecturalDecisions.choice: Render fixed audio widgets fixed to bottom right screen coordinates.
architecturalDecisions.why: Offers sound feedback without cluttering main envelope styles.

risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Gracefully handle audio play rejects and show unmuted controls.

tasks: Implement the multi-phase states: closed sealed, breaking seal, unfolding, and slide-out
Add envelope style classes in src/styles/creator.css for classic, scroll, and booklet options
Implement procedurally synthesized audio cues inside src/utils/audioEngine.ts
Trigger seal breaking synthesis sound effect on user seal click gesture
Initialize and trigger ambient music loops on envelope open success
Create interactive floating volume button src/components/shared/AudioToggle.tsx
Add wavelength animations indicating audio level and speaker mute status
Link toggles to the central audio engine mute/unmute functions
Update src/App.tsx recipient loading path to wrap InvitationStage with EnvelopeWrapper
Allow guests to override audio status via floating overlay triggers
Validate that existing regression tests pass
